title: Laursen Pmax/Tmax Protocol
description: Individualized VO2max intervals based on personal physiology
purpose: Individualized VO2max intervals based on personal physiology

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 75% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 120% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: target 120%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more. Then one more. That's how champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is brutal. You chose brutal. Now finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/8 — hold 120% FTP at 85-90 rpm. Seated. 900s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your competition is resting. You're getting faster. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 5 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep into the workout now. Stay present. One interval at a time.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 4. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 4: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 12min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5 of 8 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/8. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/8 — hold 120% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 360s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 6 of 8 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 7 of 8.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 7/8 — hold 120% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 180s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7 of 8 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 7: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 70 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 8. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 60% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
